allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''version:'''', d.get\(''''version''''\)\); print\(''''peerDeps:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''peerDependencies'''', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
